session.user: Run `make fast-ci` and report the full results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report what happened.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

session.assistant:
## Summary
`make fast-ci` failed with exit code 2. Here are the results:
**Failed Components:** - **Format Check (Prettier)**: 1 file would be reformatted - `src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py` - 1 file needs formatting, 1625 files already formatted
**Passed Components:** - Lint: All checks passed - Markdown Check: OK - Exec Reference Check: OK (`.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is up to date) - Type checking (ty): All checks passed - Unit Tests (erk): 5487 passed in 20.89s - Unit Tests (erk-dev): 136 passed in 4.24s - Unit Tests (erk-statusline): 112 passed in 0.81s - Unit Tests (erkbot): 114 passed in 2.15s
**Root Cause:** The build failed because `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/dispatch_cmd.py` does not meet Prettier code formatting standards and needs to be reformatted.
